Title: User logs in successfully

2. Click on the login button

Test Steps:

2. Click on the login button

Title: User logs out successfully
Test Steps: 1. Click on the logout button

Title: Admin logs in successfully
Test Steps:
1. Enter admin username and password
2. Click on the login button

Title: Admin logs in with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter incorrect admin username and password
2. Click on the login button

Title: Admin logs out successfully
Test Steps: 1. Click on the logout button

Title: User views product details
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page
2. Click on the product name

Title: Admin edits product details
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Data: product name: "Sample Product", new description: "Updated Description"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page
2. Click on the edit button
3. Update the product description
4. Save changes

Title: User adds product to cart
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page
2. Click on the "Add to Cart" button
Expected Result: Product is added to the cart

Title: User adds invalid quantity to cart
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page
2. Enter invalid quantity
3. Click on the "Add to Cart" button

Title: Admin removes product from cart
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists in cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page
2. Click on the "Remove" button next to the product
Expected Result: Product is removed from the cart
